{{Infobox location
| name = Forge (The Traveler's Gate Trilogy)
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The forge has obsidian walls and anvils of various sizes.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c10">''House of Blades'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Tartarus Incarnation]] knocked the door to the forge off its hinges.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14">''City of Light'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The forge is a location the giant enters.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
